convened.description: True when a forum ran and its reference space is being projected here. False = degraded no-room mode (reject path).

note.description: One line: convened + how the room shaped the mapping, OR skipped + why (degraded mode: wide bands, confidence at most medium).

score.description: 0-100. Who they are: traits, track record, execution evidence. A projection of the room, not computed inside it. The persistent Founder Score from Memory is one input, not a substitute.

band.description: [low, high]. Thin evidence or an unresolved fork touching this axis = wide band. Code-side check enforces 0<=low<=score<=high<=100.

cold_start.description: True when scored on public footprint only. Cold start widens the band; it never counts as negative evidence.

evidence_refs.description: Signal ids grounding any movement off the prior. No evidence, no score movement.

position_refs.description: Seat references into the room: 'seat-N/pre', 'seat-N/post', 'debate', 'adjudication' (optionally with a fragment like 'debate#turn-11'); 'bull/pre' etc. for 2-pole rooms. Required (>=1) when room.convened.

room_effect.description: How the room moved this axis off the prior — which held/refined/conceded position drove it. Empty string in degraded no-room mode.

position_refs.description: Seat references into the room. Required (>=1) when room.convened.

room_effect.description: How the room moved this axis. Empty string in degraded no-room mode.

notes.description: Sizing sketch, competitor clusters, the structural why-now — or why-not.

verdict.description: Does the idea survive scrutiny as-is, or is the team strong enough to pivot? Deliberately entangles idea quality with team adaptability — that is the axis.

position_refs.description: Seat references into the room. Required (>=1) when room.convened.

room_effect.description: How the room moved this axis. Empty string in degraded no-room mode.

disagreement.description: Where the three axes point in different directions, stated plainly. The axes are NEVER averaged — disagreement is the signal an investor needs to see. Empty string only when all three genuinely agree. NO forum_trigger lives here anymore; the forum ran before this stage.
